title: AssetManifest_merged
description: Output schema of manifest_merge.py. Combines a shared manifest (locale-free assets) with a locale draft manifest (vo_items + background_overrides) into a single file the renderer reads. start_sec/end_sec are required on vo_items; duck_intervals are required on music_items; locale_scope is locked to 'merged'; shared_ref is forbidden.

locale_scope.description: Always 'merged' for files produced by manifest_merge.py

timing_lock_hash.description: SHA-256 of canonical per-locale per-shot duration list. Computed by manifest_merge.py.

vo_items.description: VO items from the locale draft manifest. start_sec and end_sec are required and must be episode-cumulative timestamps from vo_preview_approved.{locale}.json, applied by manifest_merge.py (approved override block) or by patch_vo_draft_timings.py before merge.

start_sec.description: Episode-cumulative start time of this VO item (seconds), sourced from vo_preview_approved.{locale}.json. NOT shot-relative.

end_sec.description: Episode-cumulative end time of this VO item (seconds), sourced from vo_preview_approved.{locale}.json. NOT shot-relative.

azure_style.description: Omit or null to suppress express-as. Copied verbatim from VoiceCast.json — do NOT invent per-line values.

music_items.description: Music items from the shared manifest with duck_intervals computed by manifest_merge.py.

start_sec.description: Music start time within the shot. Default 0.0.

duck_db.description: Music attenuation in dB during VO playback

fade_sec.description: Linear ramp duration in seconds at each duck interval boundary

duck_intervals.description: List of [t0, t1] intervals (seconds) during which music is ducked. Required; computed by manifest_merge.py.

background_overrides.description: Locale-specific background overrides for overflow shots. Empty array if no overflows.

uri.description: Relative path to the override video file
